prerequisites: A US Census Data API key. The Census Bureau states that all data queries to the Census Data API now require an API key; request one at the Census API key signup page.
A target dataset and vintage to query, expressed as a path under the API base https://api.census.gov/data (for example 2019/pep/charagegroups). This becomes the connector's query_path.

Knowledge of the variables and geography you want to retrieve, since the Census Data API selects fields with a get= parameter (up to 50 variables per call) and filters geography with for= and in= predicates. These become the connector's query_params.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single api_key secret. The Census Data API requires the key to be supplied as the key= query parameter on every request (for example &key=YOUR_KEY appended to the query URL). Obtain the key from the Census Bureau's free API key signup.

setupSteps.title: Request a Census Data API key
setupSteps.body: Go to the US Census Data API key signup page (https://api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html, also linked as Request an API Key from https://www.census.gov/data/developers/api-key.html), agree to the terms of service, and submit the request. The Census Bureau issues the key for free, and it is required for all Census Data API data queries.

setupSteps.title: Set the api_key field
setupSteps.body: Enter the issued key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as the Census Data API key= parameter to authenticate each request.

setupSteps.title: Set query_path to the dataset and vintage
setupSteps.body: Set the required query_path field to the dataset path that follows the API base https://api.census.gov/data. For example, 2019/pep/charagegroups selects the 2019 Population Estimates dataset. The full request URL becomes https://api.census.gov/data/<query_path>.

setupSteps.title: Set query_params for variables and geography (optional)
setupSteps.body: Use the optional query_params field to supply the Census Data API predicates. Select variables with get= (comma separated, up to 50 per call, such as get=NAME,POP), restrict geography with for= (such as for=state:* or for=state:01), and narrow to sub-state geographies with in= when needed. Wildcards (*) retrieve multiple geographies at once.
